name: Turkey Sauteed with Pears & Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat until the oil sizzles, about 1 minute.
2. Place turkey breast slices and garlic in the skillet.
3. Cook for about 1-2 minutes on each side or until the turkey breasts are lightly browned.
4. Sprinkle with peppercorns and salt.
5. Pour in apple juice and cream over the slices.
6. Add pears.
7. Cover; cook for 1-2 minutes longer or until pears are heated.
8. Sprinkle with toasted pecans.
9. If desired, serve on a bed of hot fluffy rice.
